claim_boundary: Together with the source-hashed outer-tube and wall artifacts, this proves the coefficient inequalities required for a global 1/100 coercivity theorem. Form closability, the operator domain, the two-sided inverse, and a nonzero forced response remain open.
next_certificate: prove closability and density of the common weighted smooth core, join the origin and outer coefficient bounds, and apply the representation theorem to obtain the Friedrichs inverse
